sections.name: Hymnus Vespera
lines: @Sancti/10-DU

sections.name: AntMatutinumM
lines: This is God, our God unto eternity, and for ever and ever: he shall rule us for evermore.;;47
In Him shall all the tribes of the earth be blessed; all the nations shall proclaim His greatness.;;71
Say ye among the Gentiles, the Lord hath reigned, He shall judge the world with justice, and the people with his truth.;;95
The Lord hath reigned, let the earth rejoice: let many islands be glad.;;96
Make a joyful noise before the Lord our king: because he cometh to judge the earth.;;97
Exalt ye the Lord our God, and adore at his holy mountain: for the Lord our God is holy.;;98

sections.name: Ant Matutinum 3N
lines: Christ is given all principality and the honour of the kingdom: all peoples and tribes and languages will serve him forever.

sections.name: Lectio11
lines: @Sancti/10-DU:Lectio8:s/Now the Lord.*//s

sections.name: Responsory11
lines: R. There is none like to thee, O Lord: thou art great, and great is thy name in might,
* Who shall not fear thee, O king of nations?
V. For thine is the glory: among all the wise men of the nation: You are the living God, and the everlasting king.
R. Who shall not fear thee, O king of nations?

sections.name: Lectio12
lines: @Sancti/10-DU:Lectio8:s/.* Now the Lord/Now the Lord/s

sections.name: Responsory12
lines: R. I saw the Lord sitting upon a throne, high and lifted up, and the whole earth was full of His glory
* And His train filled the temple.
V. Above it stood the Seraphim each one had six wings.
R. And His train filled the temple.
